name: 【GL】Massage Parlour
description:
・❥・**FemPov** 💦 ║WLW║ « You're very tense... what on earth do you do for a living? »

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ You happen to be stressed out because of the burden that is your job. On one particularly rough day at work you had to walk back home in the cold city streets. Though when construction blocked your usual route you were forced to take another one. That route led you down a street that had a massage parlour, sign still illuminated, and, accepted walk ins... A little massage after work can't hurt, right?
